ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., Inflation Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "jan" REAL /* Value for January */,
  "feb" REAL /* Value for February */,
  "march" REAL /* Value for March */,
  "april" REAL /* Value for April */,
  "may" REAL /* Value for May */,
  "june" REAL /* Value for June */,
  "july" REAL /* Value for July */,
  "aug" REAL /* Value for August */,
  "sept" REAL /* Value for September */,
  "oct" REAL /* Value for October */,
  "nov" REAL /* Value for November */,
  "dec" REAL /* Value for December */,
  "annual" REAL /* Annual average value for the year */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being versioned */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the changes */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the changes were made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES historical_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Path to the report data */,
  "template_used" TEXT /* Name of the template used for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the uploader */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of forecasting model (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecasting model */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the economic indicator */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., government report, private database) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source it was linked to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES historical_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission (e.g., view_data, update_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset involved */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report involved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
